intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current visual data. P1 (Yellow Pot) is present but appears devoid of foliage. P3 (Black Pot with Rabbit) contains a single, isolated sprout. P2 and P4 are not clearly distinguishable as separate entities; the biome appears to be a consolidated soil environment.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss (No visible String of Nickels foliage)

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface, no signs of succulent growth.
plant_audit.P3: Contains a single, thin, light-green sprout emerging from the soil. The white rabbit anchor is present but the Pothos is absent.
plant_audit.P2_P4_Zone: Appears as a singular, dark, damp soil mass with no identifiable plant life.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots, suggesting recent irrigation or high humidity.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white granular material (likely perlite or eggshell fragments) on the soil surface of the P3 pot.
biome_observations.incidental_growth: None observed beyond the single sprout in P3.

temporal_deltas.EARLIEST_to_T-3: Initial state shows bare soil in all containers.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Emergence of a single, thin green sprout in the P3 pot.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Sprout in P3 shows slight elongation and vertical orientation.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Sprout in P3 maintains position; no further growth or new sprouts detected.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of near-total failure. The lack of established specimens suggests a collapse of the original registry. The single sprout in P3 is the only sign of life, though it is insufficient to classify the biome as healthy.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of a single, unidentifiable sprout in a pot designated for Pothos. The total absence of the registered species (String of Nickels, Mexican Mint, Silver Guest).
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. The biome has suffered a catastrophic loss of the original specimens. The current state is characterized by bare, damp soil with only one solitary sprout emerging in the P3 container. The environment is currently under-populated and failing to meet the expected botanical registry.
